events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: missing/unrated test blinds at the pressure test boundary is a critical, stop-work hazard (blowout/projectile risk, potential over-pressurization of unisolated systems). Decision is `fail` — immediate action is to stop pressurizing, vent, establish an exclusion zone, and install engineering-verified blinds rated for the test pressure per ASME B31.3 §345 before resuming.
